text.title: Speech-to-Text — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: support-call transcription with Deepgram Nova-2 + custom medical vocab + faster-whisper fallback.

example.title: stt-config.yaml for medical support calls
example.code:
provider: deepgram model: nova-2-medical mode: streaming max_chunk_seconds: 300 overlap_seconds: 5 diarization: true custom_vocab: - "ibuprofen" - "acetaminophen" - "GERD" - "fibromyalgia" - "ICD-10 M79.7"
fallback: provider: faster-whisper-local model: large-v3-turbo trigger: consecutive_5xx: 3 timeout_seconds: 10
eval_evidence: bench_clip: evals/30min-support-call.wav baseline_wer: 0.18 measured_wer: 0.087 latency_p95_ms: 240
example.note: Demonstrates r1 (Deepgram for custom vocab), r4 (300s chunk + 5s overlap), r5 (faster-whisper fallback). Custom vocab cuts WER from 0.18 to 0.087 on medical terms.
